title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.696 - Child defined — videotaped testimony for juvenile court hearings
text:
491.696.  Child defined — videotaped testimony for juvenile court hearings. — For purposes of sections 491.696 to 491.705, the term "child" means a person seventeen years of age or under who is the alleged victim of sexual abuse, physical abuse, or neglect as such terms are defined in section 210.110.
(L. 1987 H.B. 598)
